Module 6 - Lesson 1
Purpose Of The Transaction Maximization Sequence:
Transaction Maximization Sequence

-- 1 of 8 --

Module 6 - Lesson 1
Purpose Of The Transaction Maximization Sequence:
The Transaction Maximization Sequence Is A Strategic
Series Of Add-On Offers That Tap Into Existing
Consumer Psychology And Eliminate Common
Friction In The “Upgrading” Process

-- 2 of 8 --

Module 6 - Lesson 1
Purpose Of The Transaction Maximization Sequence:
The Whole Objective With This Sequence Is To
Maximize Front-End
Transaction Value

-- 3 of 8 --

Module 6 - Lesson 1
Purpose Of The Transaction Maximization Sequence:
Front-End Transaction Value Is The Average
Amount Of Money New Customers Spend 	!
With You During The First Transaction

-- 4 of 8 --

Module 6 - Lesson 1
Purpose Of The Transaction Maximization Sequence:
The Overall Objective Of The Transaction
Maximization Sequence Is To 	Maximize Average
Front-End Transaction Value 	So You Can Afford To
Invest More & More To Acquire New Customers

-- 5 of 8 --

Module 6 - Lesson 1
Purpose Of The Transaction Maximization Sequence:
IMPORTANT:	!
This WHOLE PORTION Of The
Funnel Is The Front-End

-- 6 of 8 --

Module 6 - Lesson 1
Purpose Of The Transaction Maximization Sequence:
The Biggest Players In Direct Response Marketing
Don’t View Their Front-End Marketing As An
Expense. They View It As An Investment In
Customer Acquisition, Future Profits, 	!
And Business Growth.

-- 7 of 8 --

Module 6 - Lesson 1
Purpose Of The Transaction Maximization Sequence:
Your Objective With This Funnel 	!
Is 	NOT 	To Generate Profit. Your
Objective Is To 	Acquire Maximum 	!
New Customers At Break-Even.

-- 8 of 8 --
